title: Chiguru Multispeciality Hospital
heading: Chiguru Multispeciality Hospital
text:
Chiguru Multispeciality Hospital +91 9972326666 info@chiguruhospital.com #153, Rajanukunte Home + About + Services + Internal Medicine And Diabetology General Laparoscopic Surgery Obstetrics and Gynecology Adolescent Clinic Infertility Pediatrics and Neonatology Urology and Nephrology Orthopaedics & Trauma Care Facilities + Modular OT Ultrasound and Doppler NICU ICU Usg Ultra Sound and Doppler 2 D ECHO HI and LAB Pharmacy 24×7 Emergency & Casualty 24X7 Ambulance 24×7 Blog + Contact + Make appointment We Care For Your Health Exceptional care for everybody. The skill to heal, the spirit to care. Clinical Programs Health care services and supportive care for the complete well-being of the patients. Radiology Group Leading provider of Teleradiology Solutions including Telereporting and Radpeer Review Services. Health Checkups Customized preventive health check packages ideal for all age groups of men and women. Make appointment Schedule an appointment with our super specialists Doctors. Chiguru Multispeciality Hospital Chiguru Multispeciality Hospital is probably one of the best in class hospital in Bangalore North that is located on Rajanukunte, Doddaballapur main Road, Bangalore with over a 40 bed comfort that is established to shower quality care in the medical fraternity. CHIGURU HOSPTIAL is 40 bedded capacity hospital spread over 8000 sq. feet area, 3 Floors, provides the highest standard of clinical expertise and nursing care with specialized 1 major operation theater that is modular OT with laminar flow and shields first of its kind in Bangalore rural, and 1 Minor OT, we proved 5 bed ICU, Ultrasound, General wards, Semi Special and Special wards, 24hours Pharmacy, High End Laboratory, and Digital X-Ray etc. Round the clock Doctors, 24 hours Ambulance, In House parking facility available. 100% Expert Doctor Instant Service Instant Medicine Always Doctor 149 + World Awards 2 M+ Happy Patients 449 + Expert Doctors 10 K+ Done Operation Why People choose us Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisi cing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore Always online services Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur Instant Operation Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur 24/ 7 Advanced care Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur Make Appointment Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur Our Team Specialist Doctors Amelia 	Linda Cancer spacial Charlie Linda Cancer spacial Lauren 	Linda Cancer spacial Michael Linda Cancer spacial Advanced technology attachment Advanced Technology Attachment (ATA) is a standard physical interface for connecting storage devices within a computer.
